Allow to transfer errors if the adapter: Allow to transfer errors if the adapter crashes. Private data like usernames, passwords, tokens, ... will be NOT be transferd.
CoAP ist supported by Gen1 devices, MQTT: CoAP ist supported by Gen1 devices, MQTT is supported by all devices (Gen1 and Gen2)
Http Username and Http Password in secti: Http Username and Http Password in section RESTRICTED LOGIN on your Shelly device
IP address or hostname of the external M: IP address or hostname of the external MQTT broker
Must be configured on all Shelly devices: Must be configured on all Shelly devices
Port of the external MQTT broker (defaul: Port of the external MQTT broker (default: 1883)
Shelly devices that shall not be display: Shelly devices that shall not be displayed.. Enter device id of Shelly like 8B22BD
Update objects even if there is no value: Update objects even if there is no value change
Use the internal MQTT broker or connect: Use the internal MQTT broker or connect to an existing external MQTT broker
Will be used to authenticate against gen: Will be used to authenticate against generation 1 devices
You have to configure the same password: You have to configure the same password on all devices
